'''Agora''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Agora system/Legends|Agora system]] that was located within [[Sluis sector/Legends|Sluis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Remaining loyal to the Republic for centuries, the Sluis sector quickly allied with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Not wishing to lose the territory, the [[Sons and Daughters of Freedom|Freedom's Sons]], led by [[Zozridor Slayke]] attempted to hold the planet, yet it fell to forces of the Separatists about the same time as the [[Battle of Cerea]].<ref name="TEA" />
